name: What can I do myself before hiring someone for voice search SEO?

mainEntity.name: What can I do myself before hiring someone for voice search SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Start by cleaning up the basics yourself: accurate listings, a clear FAQ section, fast mobile pages, and consistent business details. Bring in a professional when you need structured data implementation, technical fixes, or a multi-location strategy that has to scale.
acceptedAnswer.description: You can update your business listings, improve FAQs, and fix obvious consistency issues yourself. Hire help when the work becomes technical, multi-location, or hard to manage at scale.
